agents.name: DiscoveryAgent
agents.role: Infers business type and customer journey stages from the review corpus

agents.name: SentimentAgent
agents.role: Classifies sentiment and extracts evidence per review

agents.name: JourneyMapper
agents.role: Maps each review to the inferred customer journey stages

agents.name: PainDetector
agents.role: Clusters pain points using semantic embeddings and labels each cluster

agents.name: Evaluator
agents.role: Critiques recommendations and triggers revision loop if output is weak
